children.text: Hazards become smarter when Rapid Spin has been revealed.
No dedicated check in .ApplySpikesLayerBias for active revealed Rapid Spin. The score mainly follows layer count, pressure, and switch chance.
If Rapid Spin is in the active player's revealed used-move list, extra Spikes get discouraged. Hidden spinners are not inferred.
Expected player-facing effect: Janine and Koga stop looking scripted around hazard loops and start protecting hazard value fairly.
